01111001111110100011100000001100100101010110110 - ASI: 23

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  100 = 1 * 00
  110 = 1 * 10
  0000 = 00 * 00
  1010 = 10 * 10
  00100 = 00 * 100
  01111 = 011 * 11
  001111 = 0 * 01111
  011100 = 011 * 100
  101010 = 10 * 1010
  110100 = 110 * 100
  110110 = 110 * 110
  0000011 = 0000 * 011
  01111001111 = 01111 * 001111
  000001100100 = 0000011 * 00100
  101010110110 = 101010 * 110110
  110100011100 = 110100 * 011100
  01111001111110100011100 = 01111001111 * 110100011100
  000001100100101010110110 = 000001100100 * 101010110110
  01111001111110100011100000001100100101010110110 = 01111001111110100011100 * 000001100100101010110110
